name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编程助手提供生产级别的工程技能，使其能更高效、可靠地处理复杂开发任务，值得关注因为它提升了AI代理在实际项目中的实用性和代码质量。

name: OfficeCLI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        iOfficeAI /

      OfficeCLI  

    
      OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
summary: OfficeCLI是首个专为AI代理设计的Office工具集，无需安装Office即可自动化处理Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件，其开源免费和轻量级特性值得关注。

name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目收集并定期更新多个主流AI模型（如Claude、GPT、Gemini等）泄露的系统提示词，为研究AI行为机制提供重要参考。

name: wonderwhy-er
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        wonderwhy-er /

      DesktopCommanderMCP  

    
      This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
summary: 这是一个让Claude AI能够控制终端、搜索文件系统和进行差异文件编辑的MCP服务器项目，值得关注因为它扩展了AI助手在开发环境中的实际操作能力。

name: huxingyi
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        huxingyi /

      autoremesher  

    
      Automatic quad remeshing tool
summary: autoremesher 是一个自动四边形网格重划分工具，它能够高效地将三角网格转换为四边形网格，值得关注是因为它在几何处理领域提供了自动化的解决方案，提升了建模和模拟的效率。

name: claude-video
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bradautomates /

      claude-video  

    
      Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
summary: 该项目让Claude AI能够分析视频内容，通过下载视频、提取帧画面和转录音频为AI提供多模态理解能力，值得关注的是它突破了传统文本交互局限，开启了视频内容智能解析的新维度。

name: CubeSandbox
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        TencentCloud /

      CubeSandbox  

    
      Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
summary: 腾讯云CubeSandbox是用Rust开发的AI智能体沙箱环境，具备即时启动、高并发运行和安全隔离等特性，为AI应用提供轻量级的安全执行环境。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView利用普通WiFi信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需摄像头即可提供非接触式智能感知方案。
